S.FORM: == Gene Berce == Gene Berce sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1926, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 11, Gene Berce, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
